note: NODE-BOUNDARY parity: the unit of truth is ONE .motr node + its params -> ONE isolated computation, verified faithful (TS port == REAL FCP) across the node's param space. NOT a hand-picked C++ symbol, NOT whole-frame PSNR through the full pipeline. See DESIGN.md. kinds: filter(image->image, isolate via filter_probe.py+_filter_apply.ts), curve(value->value, the computation a <curve interp=N> segment triggers — the exact interpolation, verified bit-exact via the dlsym oracle), transform(params->matrix), generator(params->image). status: UNTESTED|VERIFIED|DIVERGED|NO_SIGNAL|NO_ORACLE.

filter.note: FAITHFUL delta-response ddb in the node's real host (delegated to fct/faithful). Static-source injection is unfaithful (synth.py lesson). Signal-gated.

generator.note: FAITHFUL delta-response ddb in the node's real host (delegated to fct/faithful). Static-source injection is unfaithful (synth.py lesson). Signal-gated.

transfer.note: EXACT per-pixel transfer via uniform-colour inputs (conform-invariant). VERIFIED when max abs channel error <= tol_levels (quantisation). Sidesteps pipeline coupling + headless-vs-GUI for pointwise colour nodes.

spatial.note: FULL-FRAME node-boundary PSNR: one injected spatial filter over a native-canvas synthetic input through REAL headless FCP vs the TS filter (_filter_apply). The SPATIAL analog of the transfer probe — for kernel filters whose neighbourhood dependence a center-pixel read can't capture. VERIFIED when worst-case full-frame RGB PSNR >= pass_db. Closes the gap left by the faithful delta-response, which only measures a spatial node's PARAM RESPONSE inside its real (often multi-stage) host.

nodes.desc: Keyframe segment interp=15/16/17 (Ease/Accelerate/Decelerate): value shaped by PCMath::easeInOut over normalized time.
Stored-tangent bezier segment value evaluation (OZBezierEval): the value-domain cubic the engine's cubicBezier ports.
Bezier time reparameterization (OZBezierFindParameter): invert the time-bezier for u, the engine's solveBezierParam.
HGBlur::GetDecimation(radius): the blur decimation-level choice (large blur -> decimate 2^level, blur small, upsample). Exact integer function the engine ports as gaussianDecimation.

Rec.709 luminance coefficients — engine LUMA709_COEFFS_FCP (blend.ts) vs FCP's own ProCore PCGetGamutColorSpaceLuminanceCoefficients(0). EXACT vector match; independently confirms the Rec.709 luma used across the decoded colour subsystem (Tint/HSV/Colorize) is FCP's authoritative working-space luma.

PAEBrightness combined. Darken+gray VERIFIED (see _darken). Brighten on saturated colours (amount>1) DIVERGES via the HGColorMatrix over-1.0 clamp (highlight-rolloff, needs GPU disasm — evidence/hgcolormatrix_clamp_probe.json).
nodes.characterized_reason: Cross-channel HGColorMatrix in a non-sRGB working space (see report). Isolated headless transfer != GUI-gate truth; closing needs a linear-working-space filter CHAIN (encode once), an engine-arch change tracked separately. Per-channel multiply shipped intentionally (GUI GT prefers it for the stacked chain).

nodes.desc: PAEBrightness darken leg (amount<=1) + gray: EXACT per-channel code-space multiply out=clip(v*amount). VERIFIED 2026-07-22 vs REAL FCP. The brighten leg on saturated colours (amount>1) is the separate HGColorMatrix over-1.0 clamp — see transfer.PAEBrightness (CHARACTERIZED).
nodes.characterized_reason: Cross-channel HGColorMatrix in a non-sRGB working space (see report). Isolated headless transfer != GUI-gate truth; closing needs a linear-working-space filter CHAIN (encode once), an engine-arch change tracked separately. Per-channel multiply shipped intentionally (GUI GT prefers it for the stacked chain).

nodes.desc: PAEBrightness BRIGHTEN regime (gain>1) on NEUTRAL/low-saturation inputs that clamp uniformly (no cross-channel over-1.0 redistribution). Complements Brightness_darken (gain<=1). The saturated-primary brighten cases stay CHARACTERIZED in the parent transfer.PAEBrightness (shared HGColorMatrix clamp).
PAEHSVAdjust combined (Hue+Saturation+Value). Value+Saturation VERIFIED in gamma-1.958 WS (see _valsat); Hue leg still CHARACTERIZED (see _hue). Combined stays DIVERGED until Hue decoded.
nodes.characterized_reason: Hue UNIT bug FIXED (degrees->radians, commit d5840c2, gate-neutral). Residual 107 levels is the linear-working-space sat/value coupling (FCP does HSV sat/value in linear light) — same class as PAEBrightness's cross-channel/working-space issue, gate-blocked (a per-filter linear encode regresses the GUI gate; needs the chain-level linear pipeline). Not an open unit bug.

nodes.desc: PAEHSVAdjust Value+Saturation legs in the DECODED gamma-1.958 working space (Rec.709 luma; Value = ws-linear multiply, Saturation = ws lerp to luma). VERIFIED 2026-07-22 vs REAL FCP (Value/Sat sub-legs).
nodes.characterized_reason: Hue UNIT bug FIXED (degrees->radians, commit d5840c2, gate-neutral). Residual 107 levels is the linear-working-space sat/value coupling (FCP does HSV sat/value in linear light) — same class as PAEBrightness's cross-channel/working-space issue, gate-blocked (a per-filter linear encode regresses the GUI gate; needs the chain-level linear pipeline). Not an open unit bug.

nodes.desc: PAEHSVAdjust Hue-rotation leg. CHARACTERIZED: FCP's hue rotation is NOT a plain HSV-hextant rotation (S/V not preserved: V drops, S rises), NOR a standard NTSC/YIQ/Rodrigues chroma rotation (all fit >26 rms). Needs the exact HgcHSVAdjust hue reconstruction decoded. GATE-NEUTRAL: all 4 shipping HSV hosts author Hue=0.
nodes.characterized_reason: Hue UNIT bug FIXED (degrees->radians, commit d5840c2, gate-neutral). Residual 107 levels is the linear-working-space sat/value coupling (FCP does HSV sat/value in linear light) — same class as PAEBrightness's cross-channel/working-space issue, gate-blocked (a per-filter linear encode regresses the GUI gate; needs the chain-level linear pipeline). Not an open unit bug.

nodes.desc: PAETint per-pixel transfer (HgcTint hard-light in gamma-1.956 working space, Rec.709 luma, tint decoded from ~sRGB). DECODED+VERIFIED 2026-07-22. Nested Color group. EXACT isolation via uniform inputs.
nodes.characterized_reason: DECODED (2026-07-22, near-complete — see evidence/tint_transfer_r1g0b0_i1.json FULL_TWO_LEG_DECODE): highlight leg = K*luma_sRGB*s2l(tint) K=3.878 (fits ~0.1 lvl, tint colour LINEARIZED); shadow leg ~2*luma-1 smoothstepped near 0.5; Intensity mix ~sRGB. The documented ceiling is cracked structurally. REMAINING to ship: pin K exactly (read SetParameter scale in disasm) + the smoothstep edges, implement in tintFilter + nested-Color read, then verify Objects__Leaves >=22.44 on the GUI gate (the compound fix, now with decoded math).

nodes.desc: PAEColorize per-pixel luma remap: out = mix(in, mix(Black,White,luma), Amount). EXACT isolation via uniform inputs.
nodes.characterized_reason: Luma-remap matches FCP at black=[0,0,0] but diverges with a nonzero black point (working-space mix, not sRGB). Same gate-blocked working-space root cause as Brightness/Tint + the faithful Colorize note (s2l endpoints match headless but regress the GUI gate).

nodes.desc: PAELevels GAMMA transfer (Histogram>RGB>Gamma) on grayscale. Per-channel power curve — faithful in sRGB.
PAEChannelMixer per-pixel 3x3 matrix multiply. EXACT isolation via uniform inputs — tests whether the channel dot is done in sRGB (engine) or linear (FCP).
PAELevels Black/White In REMAP (per-channel linear stretch toward endpoints). Tests whether the endpoint remap is faithful in sRGB (like ChannelMixer) or needs linear space (like Colorize).
nodes.characterized_reason: Black/White In endpoint remap diverges (working-space); FCP stretches gentler than TS sRGB. Same gate-blocked linear-working-space root cause as Colorize/Brightness. Gamma (separate node) stays VERIFIED — only endpoint-relative remaps diverge.

nodes.desc: ChannelMixer with amplifying diagonal (Red-Red=2 etc) = same as Brightness x2 via the SAME HGColorMatrix primitive, but through ChannelMixer. Tests whether HGColorMatrix CLAMP couples cross-channel.
nodes.characterized_reason: Diagonal-1.5x ChannelMixer == Brightness x1.5 bit-identical in FCP — confirms Brightness=HGColorMatrix + unifies the divergence to the shared HGColorMatrix over-1.0 CLAMP (lifts non-clipped channels). Non-clip matrices VERIFIED exact. Decode = HGColorMatrix render disasm; gate-blocked.

nodes.desc: PAEThreshold per-pixel transfer: luma (0.3086/0.6094/0.082 — NOT Rec.709) -> smoothstep(threshold, smoothness) -> lerp(Dark,Light). Pointwise; EXACT isolation via uniform inputs. Feeds Bloom/Glow threshold masks.

PAEContrast per-pixel transfer: affine scale about a 0.5 pivot in the gamma-1.958 working space (out_ws = 0.5 + (ws(in)-0.5)*Contrast). DECODED+VERIFIED 2026-07-22 (0.18 rms). Same unified colour WS as Tint/HSV/Colorize/Levels. 12+ shipping hosts.

PAEContrast IN-GAMUT regime (contrast c<=1.25) across the full swatch set incl. saturated primaries. Isolates the VERIFIED gamma-1.958 WS affine-about-0.5-pivot contrast (matches FCP on gray AND saturated colours until a channel exceeds 1.0) from the CHARACTERIZED c=1.5/2.0-on-saturated cases that hit the shared HGColorMatrix over-1.0 clamp. Mirrors the Brightness_darken / HSVAdjust_combined_ingamut splits.

PAEContrast on GRAY/neutral inputs — the pointwise decode (affine about 0.5 in gamma-1.958 WS) VERIFIED exact (0.18 rms). Saturated-colour over-clip is the shared HGColorMatrix GPU-readback lift, isolated in transfer.PAEContrast (characterized).

PAELevels output remap (Black Out/White Out): affine out=ws_inv(bo+ws(in)*(wo-bo)) in the gamma-1.958 WS, raw endpoints. DECODED+param-IDs VERIFIED 2026-07-22 (Black Out=2, White Out=4). Same unified colour WS.
PAEFill (Color mode): out = lerp(input, fillColor, Mix). Pointwise; EXACT isolation via uniform inputs. Checks the fill-lerp space (code vs working) and nested Color IDs.

PAELevels ALL stages together (in-remap + gamma + out-remap). CHARACTERIZED 2026-07-22: the stages do NOT naively compose in one WS pass. DECODED order = in-remap+gamma in the gamma-1.958 WS, DECODE to code, then output-remap in CODE space (out=code*(wo-bo)+bo*255). This brings the combined error 12->3.4 rms; a ~3-level mid offset + ~12 at the white-in clip edge remain (clip-interaction, further decode). Each leg VERIFIED alone (Levels/_remap/_outremap).

PAEChannelMixer output OFFSET (the 'Red - Alpha' constant column): out_ch += offset*255 in code space. DECODED 2026-07-22 (delta exactly offset*255). Resolves the prior 'non-converged offset' gap — that was the shared over-1.0 clamp on clipping inputs, not the offset op. Gray/non-clip inputs only.

PAEHSVAdjust with Hue+Saturation+Value combined. VERIFIES the WS-HSV legs COMPOSE: in-gamut cases match ~0.4 lvl (c1 desat+dim, c3 hue+desat+dim). Over-saturation+value>1 on saturated inputs diverges via the shared HGColorMatrix over-1.0 clamp (characterized).

PAEHSVAdjust multi-param composition, IN-GAMUT regime (dim/desaturate — no over-1.0 highlight). Isolates the VERIFIED HSV leg composition (Hue+Sat+Value compose exactly in the gamma-1.958 working space) from the CHARACTERIZED oversaturate_bright case, which hits the shared HGColorMatrix over-1.0 clamp. Mirrors the Brightness_darken/Brightness split.
PAEColorize node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAELevels node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).

PAEDirectionalBlur node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEFlop node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAERadialBlur node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEBadTV node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEBlackHole node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEBloom node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEBrightness node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEChannelMixer node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAECloudsV node (scenenode). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEEarthquake node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEGlow node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).

PAEGlow at its own node boundary: full-frame PSNR of the isolated single-filter render (mask ramp + decimated Gaussian blur + HgcGlowCombineFx) vs REAL headless FCP at native 1920x1080. filter.PAEGlow delegates to the faithful delta INSIDE Lights__Bloom and reads 13.5 dB (a Bloom-pipeline artifact); isolated here PAEGlow matches at 40+ dB, proving the decode is faithful and the divergence lives in the Bloom host, not the Glow node.
PAENoise node (scenenode). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAETint node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEUnderwater node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEZoomBlur node (filter). Verified via the FAITHFUL delta-response in its real host (delegated to fct/faithful).
PAEZoomBlur (spatial: radial zoom blur). Delegated faithful delta reads 15.8 dB inside its host; isolate at the node boundary.
nodes.characterized_reason: Log-polar zoom model verified 24-29 dB on rings but the off-centre hard-disc synth is a worst case (14.5 dB): FCP spreads the bright disc radially far more than the TS log-polar Gaussian at matched Amount (signed +12 inner / -21 mid). Residual is the documented log-polar centre-resampling ceiling (directional-blur.ts PHASE-2 CEILING NOTE); shipping users author Amount=0 (static) so gate-inert. Needs a super-sampled/centre-refined log-polar buffer.
nodes.note: log-polar zoom verified 24-29 dB on rings (directional-blur.ts L363); a hard off-center disc is a worst case. A large NEGATIVE signed bias (TS darker) means the TS log-polar spread is TOO WEAK vs FCP's radial energy spread — the real decode lead (ZOOM_LOG_K / Amount->sigma), separate from the resample ceiling.

nodes.desc: PAEGaussianBlur (spatial: decimated Gaussian). Absolute full-frame node-boundary check to complement the delta-response VERIFIED.

PAEDirectionalBlur (spatial: 1D directional blur). Absolute full-frame node-boundary check. Uses the TEXTURED synth (a flat frame gives a 1-D blur no signal). pass_db=24 reflects the documented polar-resample discretization ceiling (~24-26 dB, directional-blur.ts line 206) — a harness limit, not a decode error; signed bias ~0.
nodes.note: polar-resample discretization caps the all-edges ceiling ~24-26 dB (directional-blur.ts L206); a faithful decode is harness-limited here, not divergent — near-zero signed bias confirms the kernel math matches.

nodes.desc: PAEBloom at its node boundary: decode-faithful FLOAT bloom (HgcBloomThreshold extract x10-Thr/10 -> float blur 0.5*Amount -> HgcEchoScaleAndAdd additive orig+blur*(|Bright-50|*4/50), clip-to-white). Delegated filter.PAEBloom reads 7.0 dB inside its host; the notes report the float path matches headless ~50 dB isolated at shipping params vs the broken 8-bit glowFilter at 3.7 dB. engine_env selects the decoded float path (shipped default is still 8-bit, gated on host-composition work).
nodes.characterized_reason: Pointwise extract+combine LAW verified EXACT vs headless FCP across the full (input v in {60,97,128,190,255}) x (Threshold in {0,15,30,50,75,100}) grid at max |dR|=0.3 levels (HgcBloomThreshold x10-Thr/10 extract + HgcEchoScaleAndAdd additive orig+blur*(|Bright-50|*4/50), clip-to-white — all register-decoded). At the SHIPPING regime (Threshold=0, full-frame bloom to white) the spatial render VERIFIES at 42.7 dB. The Threshold>0 spatial divergence (27-30 dB) is NOT the decode: the residual is a uniform ~-1.5 level flat-field deficit (99.4% of pixels; edges match at MAD 0.5) = the shared decimated FLOAT blur spreads the sparse high-contrast extracted-highlight layer with a slightly lighter tail than FCP's Gaussian (disc energy: FCP reaches +7.6 more just outside the disc and +1.8 more in the far field). Same blur-tail ceiling family as Glow's dark-tail and Zoom's log-polar spread; retuning the shared sigma/truncation risks the VERIFIED PAEGaussianBlur (49 dB), so decode-don't-fit holds. Gate-inert: shipping Bloom slugs author Threshold->0 with full-frame bloom, the VERIFIED regime. Float path guarded by FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT (shipped default still 8-bit, gated on 360deg_Bloom host composition).
